Teresa Torres style: outcome at the top, opportunities underneath, solutions at the leaves, for our checkout conversion goal

queries.notes: Ranking a flat list of known candidates, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: We haven't agreed what outcome to drive next quarter; help me write the OKRs first
queries.notes: The outcome must be set before a tree, per When NOT to Use
